ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was taken */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the image */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of image processing (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the plant */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was planted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the plant is located */,
  "managed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the plant */,
  "plant_type" TEXT /* Type of plant (e.g., fruit, vegetable, ornamental) */,
  "plant_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the plant (e.g., healthy, infected, treated) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "treatment_history" TEXT /* History of treatments applied to the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_managed_by FOREIGN KEY ("managed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_probabilities" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "healthy" REAL /* Probability that the plant is healthy */,
  "multiple_diseases" REAL /* Probability that the plant has multiple diseases */,
  "rust" REAL /* Probability that the plant has rust */,
  "scab" REAL /* Probability that the plant has scab */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who analyzed the image */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the image was analyzed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the disease probability predictions */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis (e.g., CNN, SVM) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations made during the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_probabilities_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, farmer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., computer, mobile) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view image, download data) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
